original: Using supplements to heal yourself will only work once per fight. No body can handle the metabolic strain of downing multiple regenerative items in such quick succession.
You are hit by a rush of arousal!

You pull out the sludgy fungal extract from your pack and uncork it, instantly scrunching your nose up at the pungent aroma of it. Still, you force yourself to knock it back, draining the vial down and grunting as it burns your throat.
You quickly feel a rush of vigor... and a hint of arousal burning your cheeks.
You are hit by a rush of arousal!
and more than a little healthier!
